name: American Indian College Fund

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen or permanent resident; tribal enrollment or descent required
eligibility.other_requirements: Must be an enrolled member or descendant of a federally or state-recognized tribe; must provide tribal enrollment documentation

stackable_notes: Generally stackable; some HBCU/Tribal college coordination.
notes: Umbrella portal for 50+ scholarships — students apply through one application and get matched. Tribal enrollment documentation required.
